commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the doctor gateway repair flow to read recent restart handoffs in the normal doctor path, re-probe gateway health before prompting, skip the restart prompt when healthy, default the running-service restart prompt to No, and add focused tests.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +70. Total +85 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main enters maybeRepairGatewayDaemon with healthOk false and a loaded running service, then presents the restart prompt. The linked issue supplies macOS logs, but I did not run a live LaunchAgent reproduction in this read-only review.
